name: Attio
description: Attio CRM platform. Manage meetings, call recordings, and customer relationship data.

credential_fields.name: accessToken
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Attio API access token (generate at app.attio.com under Settings > Developers > API keys)

tools.name: list_meetings
tools.description: List and filter meetings from Attio CRM. Supports cursor-based pagination and time-range filtering by start/end timestamps. Use ends_from and starts_before to narrow results to a specific date range.

limit.description: Maximum number of meetings to return. Defaults to 50, maximum 200.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's pagination.next_cursor field. Omit for the first page.

ends_from.description: Filter to meetings ending after this timestamp (inclusive). ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z.

starts_before.description: Filter to meetings starting before this timestamp (exclusive). ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z.

timezone.description: Timezone for interpreting ends_from and starts_before filters. Defaults to UTC. IANA timezone format, e.g. America/New_York.

tools.name: list_call_recordings
tools.description: List all call recordings associated with a specific meeting in Attio CRM. Returns recording metadata including video URLs and processing status. Requires a meeting ID obtained from the list meetings endpoint.

meeting_id.description: The unique identifier of the meeting to list call recordings for.

limit.description: Maximum number of call recordings to return. Defaults to 50, maximum 200.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's pagination.next_cursor field. Omit for the first page.

tools.name: create_call_recording
tools.description: Create a new call recording for a meeting in Attio CRM. Provide a video URL pointing to the recording file. Rate limited to 1 request per second. This endpoint is in alpha.

meeting_id.description: The unique identifier of the meeting to attach the call recording to.

video_url.description: The publicly accessible URL of the call recording video file (e.g. https://example.com/recording.mp4).

tools.name: create_meeting
tools.description: Find or create a meeting in Attio CRM. Uses external_ref for idempotency -- if a meeting with the same external_ref already exists for your integration, it will be returned instead of creating a duplicate. Supports setting title, description, time range, participants, and linked records. This endpoint is in alpha.

data.description: The meeting data object containing all meeting details.

title.description: The title of the meeting, e.g. 'Onboarding Session'.

description.description: A text description or summary of the meeting.

start.description: The start time of the meeting.

end.description: The end time of the meeting.

is_all_day.description: Whether this is an all-day meeting. Defaults to false.

is_organizer.description: Whether this participant is the meeting organizer.

external_ref.description: A unique external reference identifier for idempotency. Calls with the same external_ref from your integration will be treated as the same meeting.

linked_records.description: Records to link to this meeting (e.g. companies, deals).

object.description: The object type slug, e.g. 'companies' or 'deals'.
